channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Halloween: The Game Reveals Release Date and Pre-Order Bonuses
item.content:encoded:
Pre-orders for the forthcoming Halloween game are now live, and the game launches this September.

Halloween: The Game, which is, of course, based on the popular horror movie franchise starring Michael Myers, was revealed in 2025. This is a 1v4 horror game along the lines of Dead by Daylight. As part of the Future Games Show on June 6, it was officially revealed that pre-orders are available now and the game drops on September 8. Those who pre-order the game will be able to play on September 4.

Halloween: The Game Pre-Order Perks

The pre-order bonuses have been announced as well. Those who pre-order the deluxe version of the game will receive Early Access and an exclusive Phantom Michael Myers Skin. However, if you pre-order the digital deluxe edition, you also receive an exclusive Inmate Michael Myers Skin and two exclusive civilian characters: Richard and Alexis.

There are also more bonuses that have yet to be announced. The game is available for pre-order on Steam, the Epic Games Store, the Sony PlayStation 5, and XBOX Series X|S.

Learn more about the game by checking out details on the multiplayer elements at this link. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates ahead of its September release.

For more horror survival game news, check out the news concerning the recently announced SAW game. SAW: Genesis is a 3v1 survival game announced during Summer Games Fest 2026. Check out everything announced during Summer Games Fest here. Sound off about this story and all others on our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
